AUDIO

CONTROLS

100% is the default feel. Range 0.1%–200%. Saved between sessions.

Applies while aiming (right-click / Shift). 100% matches default ADS feel. Range 0.1%–200%.

OFF

When ON, you can move and look right after loading without clicking the game screen first.

GRAPHICS

REGULAR

Does not change zombie sync or gameplay — rendering only. Brightness is matched across tiers so difficulty stays fair.

ON
NORMAL

Beyond this distance the world fades into darkness (distance fog). Lights dim with the fog. Does not affect gameplay.

LANGUAGE

ENGLISH

Switches menu and HUD labels immediately.

DATA

Enter the creator password to unlock all weapons.

Clears all unlock progress and kill records on this device. Cannot be undone.

HOTBAR ORDER

Click a slot to select it (glows), then click another to swap. Keys 1–7 and 0 follow the new order.
